headerDisplay: Control a Sony ADCP projector (VPL-XW / VW series) as a HomeKit Television. Enable **[Advanced Settings] → [ADCP] → [Start ADCP Service]** on the projector first. Choose whether the TV's inputs are picture presets or HDMI sources; the other group can appear as switches on a companion tile.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for the projector in HomeKit.

password.title: ADCP Password
password.description: Only needed if [Requires Authentication] is ON for ADCP on the projector. Leave blank when authentication is off.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to read power/input/preset state back from the projector.

inputSource.title: TV Input List
inputSource.description: What the Television tile's input picker selects. Note: with 'Picture modes', if the projector is set (e.g. via the remote) to a mode you didn't list, no input is highlighted (the tile just reads 'On' — no warning); it's a harmless HomeKit limitation. 'HDMI sources' avoids it entirely; picture modes are best exposed as companion switches. See the README.

companionSwitches.title: Companion Switches

oneOf.title: Auto — the group not used as TV inputs

companionSwitches.description: Expose a group as a radio set of switches on a separate companion tile. 'Auto' shows whichever group is not the TV input list.

companionName.title: Companion Tile Name
companionName.description: Optional name for the companion switch accessory. Defaults to '<Name> Picture Modes' or '<Name> Inputs'.

hdmiInputs.title: HDMI Inputs
hdmiInputs.description: HDMI sources, used when 'TV Input List' is HDMI (or for HDMI companion switches). If you remove all rows, the plugin falls back to HDMI 1 + HDMI 2.

input.title: HDMI Port
input.description: Common HDMI ports. Models with different inputs: any ADCP input value is accepted — set it in the JSON config editor.

pictureModes.title: Picture Modes
pictureModes.description: Picture modes, used when 'TV Input List' is Picture modes (or for picture-mode companion switches). If you remove all rows, the plugin falls back to a sensible default set. Availability of User slots varies by unit.

mode.title: Picture Mode
mode.description: VPL-XW picture modes. Choose "Custom…" to enter a picture_mode value for another model.

customMode.title: Custom Mode Value
customMode.description: The ADCP picture_mode value to send (used only when Picture Mode = Custom…).

name.title: HomeKit Label
name.description: Shown in the Home app. Defaults to the mode's name. You can also rename inputs directly in the Home app.
